chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3843 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.17139/2019 3. For hearing of main case 20.02.2025 Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Learned counsel for the petitioner states that an appeal of the petitioner is pending with the Chief Revenue Authority, as available at page 67. Learned counsel states that the petitioner would be satisfied if concerned respondent would adjudicate the appeal vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned AAG present articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
